audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 761-762 unconditionally cap `amount = min(amount, IERC20(assetIn).balanceOf(address(this)))` before forwarding to `_getAssetOutAmount`, directly satisfying the invariant. The only alternative early exit (invalid auction → return 0) also satisfies the invariant trivially. The actual `bid()` execution path independently enforces the same bound via `BidAmountTooHigh` revert (L437-440), confirming design intent.
